name: Purple Group Limited
summary: Purple Group Limited, a financial services company, through its subsidiaries, engages in trading, investing, and asset management businesses in South Africa. It operates through GT247.com and Emperor Asset Management; and EasyEquities segments. The company operates EasyEquities, a web-based investment platform; GT247.com, a trading platform that provides a range of tradable instruments, such as 153 JSE equity contracts for differences, 5 commodities, 5 crypto currencies, 135 currency pairs, and 12 major indices, as well as private broking and do it yourself trading services; and EasyProperties, an online property investment platform. It also offers managed portfolios on the EasyEquities platform; and secures institutional asset management and consults mandates. The company was formerly known as Purple Capital Limited and changed its name to Purple Group Limited in December 2013. Purple Group Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Johannesburg, South Africa.
